title: Mine Gear Rising: Revengeance
description: MGRR weapons and gear in Minecraft
body:
Recreating some tools & armors from the popular game Metal Gear Rising: Revengeance in Minecraft!

Mine Gear Rising: Revengeance currently contains:

  • Working Murasama (with theme music)
  • Working Bloodlust (with theme music)
  • Working HF Blade (with theme music in b1.0.1+)
  • Working Dystopia (with theme music in b1.2+)
  • Working L'Etranger (with theme music in b1.2+)
  • Working Nano Machines (with theme music in b1.0.2+)
  • Support for Better Combat (b1.1.2+)

Main page on CurseForge

Use the command "/mgrr help" for user configuration commands.

The mod is still in a very early state of development so not everything is done just yet but expect more armors & weapons and maybe even bosses in the future!

Fabric is probably not going to be supported except any rouge versions I might release just because.

 

(I highly recommend using the Epic Fight datapack below for a better experience!)

Epic Fight datapack: (Showcase)

Gameplay of TheMemeSmeller playing with an Epic Fight datapack they made: (Weapons of Metal Gear)

Known bugs:

If you deactivate the Murasama with Better Combat installed it will delete whatever there is in your off-hand slot as Better Combat somewhat hides the secondary slot while holding a 2 handed weapon meaning the Murasama thinks that there is just air in the off-hand.

Supported Versions:

1.7.10: N/A: None

1.12.2: N/A: None

1.14.4: N/A: None

1.15.2: AWS: "Abandonware Support"

1.16.5: AWS: "Abandonware Support"

1.17.1: AWS: "Abandonware Support"

1.18.2: LTS: "Long Term Support"

1.19.2: ADS: "Active Dev Support"

1.19.4: STS: "Short Term Support"

1.20.1: ADS: "Active Dev Support"

1.20.4: ADS: "Active Dev Support"


Do note that this is the plan but things may change overtime!
